title: Submitting an app to the the monday.com app store
excerpt:
I’ve created an app and made it public, monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done. 
How do I submit this app such that it shows up in the apps when users browse app for adding to their boards?

posts.author: Roobrick (Dugald Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created an app and made it public, monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done.

How do I submit this app such that it shows up in the apps when users browse app for adding to their boards?

posts.author: amir (Amir Blich)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - Please use this form to submit your app for consideration.
